category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chronograf as an open source monitoring and visualization UI for the TICK stack.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides chronograf; source_facts.homepage is the official InfluxData Chronograf documentation.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official InfluxData Chronograf documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an upstream repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies monitoring and visualization for the TICK stack; source_facts.executables lists chronograf and chronoctl.
